headline: The High Stakes in Colombia's Presidential Runoff
frame_notes: Treats the runoff as a choice over security, investment and continuity of the Petro government.

headline: Right-Wing Firebrand Surges Into Colombia Runoff, Shaking Political Establishment
frame_notes: Emphasises armed groups, cocaine trafficking, investment and voter rejection of the government.

headline: Colombia's Stark Election Choice
frame_notes: Editorial framing of the runoff as a stark ideological and institutional choice.

headline: Anti-cartel candidate 'The Tiger' channels Trump and Bukele in Colombia election shocker
frame_notes: Frames De la Espriella as a security-first, anti-cartel candidate aligned with US interests.

headline: Colombian lawmakers seek suspension of Trump foe Gustavo Petro over alleged meddling
frame_notes: Centres allegations of government interference and links Cepeda to Petro's political project.

headline: Populist 'Tiger' to face leftist in Colombia presidential run-off
frame_notes: Contrasts market-oriented and state-expanding economic programmes.

headline: Bond investors bet Colombia's 'Tiger' will slash public spending
frame_notes: Focuses on investor expectations, fiscal adjustment and state reduction.

headline: Cepeda, de la Espriella advance in Colombia's presidential election
frame_notes: Frames the contest as left versus far right and foregrounds political polarisation.

headline: Colombia's outsider candidate defied the polls
frame_notes: Explains outsider mobilisation and public dissatisfaction while questioning conventional polling.

headline: Colombia's far-right presidential candidate wins first round ahead of runoff
frame_notes: Foregrounds the hard-right characterisation and political shock of the first-round outcome.

headline: Colombian far-right candidate is latest Trumpian figure in Latin America
frame_notes: Critically compares the campaign with Trump, Bukele and regional hard-right politics.

headline: Social reformer Cepeda seeks Colombia's presidency

headline: Pro-Trump candidate takes spotlight with vow of crime crackdown

headline: De la Espriella thanks Trump for endorsing his campaign

headline: Colombia's soccer jersey becomes a symbol of political division

headline: Two sides of a political chasm share one fear: a return to the past
frame_notes: Uses victim testimony to compare fears of guerrilla and state-aligned violence.

headline: ELN rebels declare ceasefire before presidential election
frame_notes: Reports an armed-actor signal relevant to electoral security and peace policy.

headline: De la Espriella seeks presidency with nationalist law-and-order campaign
frame_notes: Profiles security, state reduction, taxes, energy and controversial legal clients.

headline: Colombia's Presidential Race Heads to a Runoff
frame_notes: Explains the surprise first-round result and runoff mechanics.

headline: Colombians split on way forward as runoff looms
frame_notes: Contrasts the candidates through social division and alternative national trajectories.

headline: Colombia divided in race for president
frame_notes: Presents the runoff as a conflict between punitive security and social reform.
